mapper.select: SELECT sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code WHERE main_code='FS'
SELECT sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code WHERE main_code='FD'
SELECT sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code WHERE main_code='NF' AND sub_code!='NF2'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fac_not (fac_not_code, fac_code, emp_code, not_start_date, not_end_date, fac_not_reason_code ) VALUES (AUTO_FACNOT_CODE(), #{facCode}, #{empCode}, sysdate, null, #{facNotReasonCode})
mapper.select:
SELECT fac_code, find_fac_name(fac_code) fac_name, find_emp_name(emp_code) emp_name, not_start_date, not_end_date, get_mes_sub_code_name(fac_not_reason_code) fac_not_reason_name FROM fac_not
AND fac_code LIKE '%'||#{facCode}||'%'
AND find_fac_name(fac_code) LIKE '%'||#{facName}||'%'
AND find_emp_name(emp_code) LIKE '%'||#{empName}||'%'
AND get_mes_sub_code_name(fac_not_reason_code) LIKE '%'||#{facNotReasonName}||'%'
AND not_start_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{notStartDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{notStartDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND not_end_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{notEndDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{notEndDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
